entries.question: What is the minimum attendance required at Tetso College?
entries.answer: Students must maintain at least 75% attendance in every subject to be eligible for end-semester exams. Below 75% may result in detention.

entries.question: Is there a dress code on campus?
entries.answer: Students must wear neat, formal attire and carry their college ID card at all times on campus. Ripped jeans, slippers, and shorts are not permitted in classrooms.

entries.question: What is the anti-ragging policy?
entries.answer: Tetso College has zero tolerance for ragging. Report any incident to the Anti-Ragging Committee or the Dean of Student Affairs. Penalties include suspension and FIR registration.

entries.question: What are the library rules and timings?
entries.answer: Library is open Mon-Sat, 08:30-17:30. Up to 2 books can be issued for 14 days. Silence is mandatory; food and drinks are not allowed inside.

entries.question: Can I use my mobile phone in class?
entries.answer: Phones must stay on silent during lectures. Classroom use is at the faculty's discretion. Phones are strictly prohibited inside exam halls.
